metadata.description: Base name for the solution (e.g., tax-docs, invoice-processor). Used as prefix for all resource names to ensure consistency and traceability.
Azure region where all resources will be deployed (e.g., eastus2, westeurope). Must support Logic Apps Standard, Application Insights, and Service Bus.
Environment name to differentiate deployments and apply environment-specific configurations.
Deployment timestamp for tracking purposes. Auto-generated at deployment time.
Base name for all shared resources. Used as prefix to ensure consistent naming across modules.
Azure region for shared resources deployment. Should match Logic App deployment region.
Resource tags applied to all shared resources for cost tracking, organization, and compliance.
Base name for the user-assigned managed identity. Will be suffixed with -mi.
Azure region for managed identity deployment. Should match Logic App region.
Resource tags applied to the managed identity for organization and governance.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity for identity assignment in Logic App
Name of the user-assigned managed identity
Principal ID (object ID) of the managed identity for RBAC role assignments
Client ID (application ID) of the managed identity for app settings configuration
Base name for the storage account. Must be 3-20 characters. Will be processed to meet Azure Storage naming requirements.
Azure region for storage account deployment. Should match Logic App region for optimal latency.
Resource tags applied to the storage account for cost tracking and compliance.
Name of the deployed storage account (generated with unique suffix for global uniqueness)
Resource ID of the deployed storage account for RBAC role assignments
Base name for all monitoring resources. Used to generate unique resource names with consistent prefixes.
Azure region for monitoring resources deployment. Should match the Logic App deployment region for optimal performance.
Resource tags applied to all monitoring resources for cost tracking, organization, and compliance.
Name of the service group for health model organization. Should be descriptive (e.g., solution name or business unit).
Resource tags applied to the service group for organization, governance, and cost tracking.
Base name for the Log Analytics workspace. Will be suffixed with unique string and "-law" to ensure global uniqueness.
Azure region for the Log Analytics workspace deployment. Should match application resources for optimal data transfer costs.
Resource tags applied to the Log Analytics workspace for cost tracking, organization, and compliance.
Resource ID of the deployed Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic settings configuration
Name of the deployed Log Analytics workspace for reference and queries
Base name for Application Insights. Will be suffixed with unique string and "-appinsights" for global uniqueness.
Azure region for Application Insights deployment. Must match Log Analytics workspace region for workspace-based model.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for workspace-based Application Insights integration (best practice).
Resource tags applied to Application Insights and diagnostic settings for organization and governance.
Name of the deployed Application Insights instance
Resource ID of the deployed Application Insights instance for RBAC assignments
Instrumentation key for Application Insights telemetry
Connection string for Application Insights telemetry (recommended over instrumentation key)
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for configuring diagnostic settings on Azure resources
Name of the deployed Application Insights instance for Logic Apps app settings configuration
Name of the deployed Log Analytics workspace for reference and manual queries
Base name for Service Bus namespace. Will be suffixed with unique string and -sb for global uniqueness.
Azure region for Service Bus deployment. Should match Logic App region for optimal latency.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic logs and metrics.
Resource tags applied to Service Bus resources for cost tracking and compliance.
Name of the deployed Service Bus namespace
Resource ID of the Service Bus namespace for RBAC role assignments
Fully qualified domain name of the Service Bus namespace endpoint
Name of the deployed queue
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity for Logic Apps authentication
Name of the user-assigned managed identity
Principal ID of the managed identity for RBAC role assignments
Client ID of the managed identity for app settings configuration
Name of the deployed storage account for Logic Apps Standard runtime requirements
Resource ID of the deployed storage account for RBAC role assignments
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for Logic Apps diagnostic logging configuration
Name of the Log Analytics workspace for reference and manual KQL queries
Name of the deployed Application Insights instance for Logic Apps app settings and telemetry
Name of the deployed Service Bus namespace for Logic Apps messaging integration
Resource ID of the Service Bus namespace for RBAC role assignments to managed identity
Fully qualified endpoint of the Service Bus namespace for connection configuration
Name of the Service Bus queue for workflow message processing
Base name for Logic App and App Service Plan resources. Will be suffixed with unique string for global uniqueness.
Azure region for Logic App deployment. Must support Workflow Standard SKU and Application Insights.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic logs and metrics.
Name of the existing storage account required by Logic Apps Standard for workflow state and artifacts.
Name of the Application Insights instance for telemetry collection and performance monitoring.
Name of existing Service Bus namespace for messaging integration with workflows.
Resource tags applied to Logic App, App Service Plan, and dashboard resources for cost tracking and governance.
Base name for Logic App and App Service Plan resources. Will be suffixed with unique string for global uniqueness.
Azure region for Logic App deployment. Must support Workflow Standard SKU and Application Insights.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic logs and metrics.
Name of the Application Insights instance for telemetry collection and performance monitoring.
Resource tags applied to Logic App, App Service Plan, and dashboard resources for cost tracking and governance.
